summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for new Leaders and Articles public pages. All features working correctly including hero background change, navigation, filters, grouping, and brand colors.
passed_tests: Home page hero background changed to /images/hero-bg.jpg (Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar image)
Public navbar shows all required links: Home, Leaders, Articles, Get Involved, Admin Login
Public footer Quick Links includes Leaders and Articles links
Home page 'View All Leaders' button navigates to /leaders
Home page 'View All Articles' button navigates to /articles
Leaders page (/leaders) loads with 'All Leaders' hero title
Leaders page search bar filters leaders by name/designation/location
Leaders page level filter (All Levels, State, District, Constituency, Sub-Region) works correctly
Leaders page state filter works correctly
Leaders page displays 6 leaders grouped by level (State: 3, District: 1, Constituency: 2)
Leader cards show name, designation, level badge, and location
Leader cards link to /leader/:id
Leaders page Clear button appears when filters are active and resets all filters
Articles page (/articles) loads with 'All Articles' hero title
Articles page shows featured article at top with FEATURED badge
Articles page shows 4 remaining articles in 3-column grid
Articles page type pill filters (All, development, announcement) work correctly
Articles page search filter narrows articles by title/content
Article cards link to /article/:id
Brand colors intact on all pages: navy hero gradient, orange/magenta accents, brand-orange text
No JavaScript console errors (only expected 401 from /auth/me endpoint)
